title: Polybotrya appendiculata
taxonomy: Polybotrya appendiculata is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This species belongs to the genus Polybotrya, which consists of several species of tropical ferns. Polybotrya appendiculata is a type of epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants, typically trees, and has adapted to absorb moisture and nutrients from the air. The classification of Polybotrya appendiculata is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its frond shape and leaf arrangement. As a member of the Dryopteridaceae family, Polybotrya appendiculata shares characteristics with other ferns in this family.
